---
title: "The Rev. Charles John Vaughan"
---

## The Rev. Charles John Vaughan

**Dates:** (1816-1897)

### Description

headmaster of Harrow

### Biography

His career at Harrow 1844-1859 was ended by J. A. Symonds;  he was then vicar of Doncaster 1860-9.  He married (1850) Catherine Maria Stanley (1821-1899).

### Letters

- Letter from February 16th, 1871.
- Letter from Feb 17th [1866]    
- Letter from Febry 5th [1866]
- Letter from Jan 31st 1866
- Letter from Decr 19th [1865]
- Letter from March 23d 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
